description: Composition Red, black and grey check shirt made of 100% cotton, with two pockets on the sides of chest, stitch detailing on the front, half sleeves, with the branding on the left pocket and a curved hem Fitting Regular 43cm Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron This Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Slip into jeans along with sneakers or suede shoes to complement this trendy-yet-classic shirt. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
